Name: Faculty of Engineering
Description: Covers disciplines in civil, mechanical, electrical, and computer engineering.

Name: Faculty of Science
Description: Covers natural and applied sciences including physics, chemistry, and biology.

Name: Faculty of Arts and Humanities
Description: Covers literature, philosophy, history, linguistics, and fine arts.

Name: Faculty of Social Sciences
Description: Covers sociology, psychology, political science, and economics.

Name: Faculty of Medicine and Health Sciences
Description: Covers medicine, nursing, pharmacy, and public health.
